subcodes.first_line: The verses have been sent down, and the clear proofs have appeared, yet most of the people remain heedless. The Resurrection hath come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات و ظهرت البینات و القوم اکثرهم من الغافلین قد قامت القیامه و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
